headline: Assurant (AIZ) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Keith Demmings: Good morning, and thank you for joining us.  The first quarter represents the strongest performance in Assurant's history, driven by record earnings in Global Lifestyle. headline: AIZ Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates on Solid Investment Income

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Assurant (AIZ) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Assurant at around US$237 per share still offers value, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it? This article breaks down what the current price could mean for you. The stock has returned 0.7% over the past week and 8.7% over the past month, with a 1 year return of 21.8% and a 3 year return of 90.9%. This compares with a more modest 65.4% over 5 years and a flat year to date move of roughly a 0.2% decline. Recent coverage around Assurant has focused on its position...
